examples.text: كَثِيرٌ مِنْ النَّاسِ يُحِبُّونَ تَعَلُّمَ اللُّغَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
examples.english: Many people love to learn Arabic.

examples.text: … وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً …
examples.english: … and [God] created from it [i.e. the soul] its mate and dispersed from both of them many men and women …

examples.text: … ثُمَّ إِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِنْهُمْ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ فِي الْأَرْضِ لَمُسْرِفُونَ …
examples.english: … yet, even after that, many of them [Children of Israel] continued to commit excesses in the land …

examples.text: … وَلَٰكِنْ ظَنَنْتُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًا مِمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ …
examples.english: … however, you assumed that Allah did not know much of what you used to do …
